textByHash.27e11948d8dfe61ef857429ebb7103401fd8637d: Good Day, how can I help you?
textByHash.63a7d3f5dd4ef862f47a1d51712589891b048719: I work for Aluft Aloft Gnome Food Delivery Service. It's a growing business you know. We get more customers every day!
textByHash.ac122a8194cca5584d0fad721aae40cf8e4a279f: Aluft Gianne jnr. is in charge - he'll be able to help you.
